issue_title: Initial render is delayed by 50ms, or the value of resize.debounce
issue_body_preview: Likely due to the way [react-use-measure creates a debouncer](https://github.com/pmndrs/react-use-measure/blob/8639e5a93d60930159dc83743780ce4787fe90bb/src/web/index.ts#L116-L117), r3f canvases delay their initial render by the scroll debounce duration, which is by default 50ms. I would have thought
test_description_zh: 打开包含 react-three-fiber Canvas 的页面，观察 Canvas 的首次渲染时机，确认 3D 场景是否在页面加载后立即呈现，而非存在明显延迟。
expected_result_zh: Canvas 中的 3D 场景应在页面加载后立即渲染显示，不应存在约 50ms 或更长的初始渲染延迟，画面应瞬间出现而非先显示空白再延迟出现内容。
